verses.1: Oh clap your hands, all you nations.
verses.2: For the LORD Most High is awesome.
verses.4: He chooses our inheritance for us,
verses.5: God has gone up with a shout,
verses.6: Sing praises to God! Sing praises!
verses.7: For God is the King of all the earth.
verses.9: The princes of the peoples are gathered together,
